linux-media.name: Linux Media
linux-media.description: Camera drivers, V4L2, ISP, MIPI CSI, sensors, libcamera, UVC
linux-media.thread_expert: Linux kernel media subsystem expert. Analyze this mailing list thread about camera drivers, V4L2, ISP, MIPI CSI, sensors, libcamera, or UVC.
linux-media.thread_tech_detail: Be specific about kernel structures, register layouts, pixel formats, DT properties, or API changes. Reference struct names, function names, format fourcc codes, DT compatible strings where relevant.
linux-media.synth_audience: developer who works on embedded Linux camera systems
linux-media.synth_focus: camera drivers, V4L2, ISP, MIPI CSI, sensors, libcamera, UVC, videobuf2
linux-media.synth_acronyms: CSI-2 (Camera Serial Interface), ISP (Image Signal Processor), DT (Device Tree), CCS (MIPI Camera Command Set)
linux-media.about_text: Focus: camera drivers, V4L2, ISP, MIPI CSI, sensors, libcamera, UVC, videobuf2

soc-bringup.name: SoC Bringup
soc-bringup.description: ARM SoC support, device tree, clock, pinctrl, power management, platform drivers
soc-bringup.thread_expert: Linux kernel ARM SoC platform expert. Analyze this mailing list thread about SoC bringup, device tree, clock/pinctrl/regulator subsystems, platform driver support, or hardware enablement.
soc-bringup.thread_tech_detail: Be specific about DT compatible strings, clock/reset controller IDs, register block offsets, SoC variant names, driver probe sequences, and binding properties. Reference struct names, DT node paths, and specific IP block versions where relevant.
soc-bringup.synth_audience: developer who works on ARM SoC bringup and embedded Linux platform support
soc-bringup.synth_focus: SoC bringup, device tree bindings, clock/pinctrl/power frameworks, platform drivers, new hardware enablement
soc-bringup.synth_acronyms: DT (Device Tree), SoC (System on Chip), PSCI (Power State Coordination Interface), GIC (Generic Interrupt Controller), SMMU (System Memory Management Unit), OPP (Operating Performance Points), ICC (InterConnect), PMIC (Power Management IC)
soc-bringup.about_text: Focus: ARM SoC bringup, device tree, clock/pinctrl/regulator, platform drivers, power management, new hardware support

jetson-tegra.name: Jetson / Tegra
jetson-tegra.description: NVIDIA Tegra/Jetson kernel support, GPU, camera, power management, device tree
jetson-tegra.thread_expert: NVIDIA Tegra/Jetson kernel developer. Analyze this mailing list thread about Tegra SoC support, Jetson platforms, GPU/camera/display drivers, host1x, BPMP, or device tree bindings.
jetson-tegra.thread_tech_detail: Be specific about Tegra SoC generations (T194/T234/T239), host1x channels, VI/CSI capture pipelines, BPMP ABI, clock/reset IDs, and DT compatible strings.
jetson-tegra.synth_audience: developer who works on NVIDIA Jetson embedded platforms and Tegra kernel support
jetson-tegra.synth_focus: Tegra SoC kernel drivers, Jetson camera pipelines, host1x/GPU, BPMP, device tree, power management
jetson-tegra.synth_acronyms: VI (Video Input), NVCSI (NVIDIA CSI), BPMP (Boot and Power Management Processor), EMC (External Memory Controller), SE (Security Engine)
jetson-tegra.about_text: Focus: NVIDIA Tegra/Jetson kernel support, camera VI/CSI pipelines, host1x GPU, BPMP, display, device tree

libcamera.name: libcamera / RPi Camera
libcamera.description: libcamera framework, Raspberry Pi camera stack, PiSP, ISP tuning, camera applications
libcamera.thread_expert: libcamera and Raspberry Pi camera stack expert. Analyze this mailing list thread about the libcamera framework, pipeline handlers, IPA modules, ISP tuning, RPi camera drivers, or camera applications.
libcamera.thread_tech_detail: Be specific about pipeline handler names, IPA algorithm implementations (AGC/AWB/CCM/LSC), sensor model numbers, PiSP front-end/back-end stages, control IDs, and pixel format handling.
libcamera.synth_audience: developer who works on embedded Linux camera systems, libcamera integration, or Raspberry Pi camera applications
libcamera.synth_focus: libcamera framework, pipeline handlers, IPA modules, Raspberry Pi camera stack (PiSP/Unicam/CFE), ISP tuning, sensor drivers
libcamera.synth_acronyms: IPA (Image Processing Algorithm), AGC (Auto Gain Control), AWB (Auto White Balance), CCM (Color Correction Matrix), LSC (Lens Shading Correction), PiSP (Pi Image Signal Processor), CFE (Camera Front End)
libcamera.about_text: Focus: libcamera framework, Raspberry Pi camera stack, IPA/ISP tuning, pipeline handlers, sensor drivers
